title: Block structure mismatch in function connect ... during insert into materialized view
description:
```sql
create table dst (e Enum('a' = 0, 'b' = 1)) engine=Memory;
create table src (e Enum('a' = 0)) engine=Memory;
create materialized view mv to dst (e Enum('a' = 0)) as select * from src;
insert into src select * from generateRandom() limit 10;
```
```
2025.12.12 14:08:00.635525 [ 2404722 ] {4106071c-e9f2-4697-a8a6-613677bcf1de} <Fatal> : Logical error: 'Block structure mismatch in function connect between ConvertingTransform and RemovingReplicatedColumnsTransform stream: different types:
e Enum8('a' = 0) Int8(size = 0)
e Enum8('a' = 0, 'b' = 1) Int8(size = 0)'.
2025.12.12 14:08:00.635638 [ 2404722 ] {4106071c-e9f2-4697-a8a6-613677bcf1de} <Fatal> : Format string: 'Block structure mismatch in {} stream: different types:
{}
{}'.
```

Before https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/pull/77309 this query threw `TYPE_MISMATCH` error: https://fiddle.clickhouse.com/4a532912-75ed-45d8-8c2a-93321ae94031
@CheSema please, take a look
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE dst (e TEXT CHECK(e IN ('a', 'b')), f INTEGER);
CREATE TABLE src (e TEXT CHECK(e IN ('a')), g INTEGER);
CREATE VIEW mv AS SELECT e, g FROM src;

INSERT INTO src (e, g) SELECT CASE WHEN number % 1 = 0 THEN 'a' END, number % 10 FROM (SELECT 0 AS number UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9) LIMIT 10;
INSERT INTO dst (e, g) SELECT e, g FROM mv WHERE g IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Block structure mismatch during insert into materialized view
